feedback.text: Let me point an additional issue to that topic - some games being bought require online servers in order to be played. After shutting serves down that games are no longer playable by the customers who own a copy. Maybe some regulation needed to keep a game playable or at least to be clearly noted a certain date, when the servers shut (so to say an expire date of the product), which information the seller is not obliged to announce so far. Hope it was helpful.
